MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
John D. Suhr, Esq. for Plaintiff: Fresno Credit Bureau.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering the declaration in file, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Chi Kin Pang aka Chi K. Pang aka Pang Chi Kin aka Kent Pang aka Pang Kent Chikin aka Kent Chikin Pang aka Chikin K. Pang aka Chi Pang aka Kent C. Pang; as follows:
Principal $52,946.60

Attorney's Fees $5,650.00
Costs $326.00 for a total of $72,384.09
